description: Streak Card Cleanup & Tooltips - Remove fire emoji from streak card titles and add clickable tooltip popovers explaining each streak type on web and mobile

userStories.title: Remove fire emoji from streak card titles (Web)
userStories.description: As a user, I want the streak card titles to be clean and compact so they don't waste horizontal space.
acceptanceCriteria: The 🔥 emoji `<span>` is removed from the title row of the StreakDots component in apps/web/src/components/StreakDots.tsx
The title row still shows the streak count and label text (e.g., '3 Burn Streak')
The 7-day dot indicators remain unchanged (still show 🔥 for workout days and ○ for rest days)
Typecheck passes (cd apps/web && yarn typecheck)
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Remove fire emoji from streak card titles (Mobile)
userStories.description: As a mobile user, I want the same clean card titles without the fire emoji.
acceptanceCriteria: The 🔥 emoji is removed from the title row of the StreakDots component in apps/mobile/src/components/StreakDots.tsx
The fireEmoji style and corresponding <Text> element are removed from the component
The title row still shows the streak count and label text
The 7-day dot indicators remain unchanged
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add tooltip popover to streak cards (Web)
userStories.description: As a user, I want to click a streak card to learn what the streak means so I understand how to maintain it.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a `tooltip` prop (type string) to the StreakDots component in apps/web/src/components/StreakDots.tsx
Clicking anywhere on a streak card opens a small popover bubble below the card with dark background (bg-gray-800), light text, max-width ~280px, and a small caret/arrow pointing up
Burn Streak tooltip text: 'Your burn streak counts workout days. It stays alive as long as you work out at least once a week (gap of 6 days max).'
Supernova Streak tooltip text: 'Your supernova streak rewards near-daily effort. It stays alive as long as you don't miss more than 1 day in a row.'
Clicking outside the popover or pressing Escape dismisses it
The card has cursor-pointer and a subtle hover effect (e.g., slightly lighter border) to signal interactivity
Popover has proper ARIA attributes (role=tooltip, aria-describedby)
Pass the tooltip prop from all 3 parent pages: burn-buddies/[id]/page.tsx, burn-squads/[id]/page.tsx, profile/[uid]/page.tsx
Tooltip text is hardcoded as constants in the component file (not fetched from API)
Use pure Tailwind CSS + React state for the popover (no external tooltip library)
Typecheck passes (cd apps/web && yarn typecheck)
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Use useEffect with document.addEventListener('mousedown', ...) for outside-click detection and keydown listener for Escape key dismissal. Keep tooltip state local to each StreakDots instance.

userStories.title: Add tooltip popover to streak cards (Mobile)
userStories.description: As a mobile user, I want to tap a streak card to see a tooltip explaining the streak type.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a `tooltip` prop (type string) to the StreakDots component in apps/mobile/src/components/StreakDots.tsx
Wrap the streak card in a Pressable with opacity feedback on press
Tapping anywhere on a streak card opens a popover bubble near the card using React Native Modal with transparent background
Burn Streak tooltip text: 'Your burn streak counts workout days. It stays alive as long as you work out at least once a week (gap of 6 days max).'
Supernova Streak tooltip text: 'Your supernova streak rewards near-daily effort. It stays alive as long as you don't miss more than 1 day in a row.'
Tapping outside the popover (on the overlay) dismisses it
Pass the tooltip prop from the parent screen: apps/mobile/src/screens/BurnBuddyDetailScreen.tsx
Tooltip text is hardcoded as constants (not fetched from API)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use React Native Modal with transparent prop and an absolutely positioned dark bubble. Similar styling to web: dark background, light text, rounded corners.
